Metadata.title: Quiet Riots
Metadata.description: Ekmone nijeder moton issues around organize koro. Apner moto manuder khoj. Ekathey action nao.

Footer.mission: Amader lifetime e amore bhalo kore dite hobe jeta amra imagine-o korte pari na.
Footer.powered: Quiet Riots · Powered by OpenClaw AI Agent

Home.headline: Bodol-ta loud na holeo powerful hoye uthte pare
Home.description: Khoj apner moton issues valo bashan manuder. Ekathey action nao. Quiet Riots manuder jora kore shared frustration around, aar complaints-k collective action e convert kore.
Home.findYourIssueDesc: Kono frustration search koro — trains, broadband, NHS, climate. Thakle amra dikha dimu koita jonay eta vag kore.
Home.useThePivotDesc: Same issue dekhte paro sab organisation-e, ba sab issues ek organisation-e. Tango dancer-der moto direction change.
Home.takeActionDesc: Ideas, actions, aar community — apner time aar skills-er moton. Choto action-ra big change e jar kore.
Home.missionQuote: "Amader lifetime e amore bhalo kore dite hobe jeta amra imagine-o korte pari na."
Home.basedOn: Based on 2014 book Quiet Riots by Simon Darling

IssueDetail.pendingBanner: Ei Quiet Riot review-e ache — evidence gather koro aar apner thoughts share koro joddi review hoye.

RejectionReasons.title: Quiet Riots Keno Reject Hoi
RejectionReasons.subtitle: Review process bujhe nao
RejectionReasons.intro: Naya Quiet Riot er sobai suggestion Setup Guide review kore, takam sure korte je eta platform fit kore aur real difference korte pare. Ekhane reasons ache je suggestion approve na bhi hote pare:
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingTitle: Existing Quiet Riot er kache karib
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP1: Agar tomaar suggestion ekta existing Quiet Riot er sathe bahut similar, amra tomaar suggestion e merge korbo. Etaa community ke focused rakhe aur fragmentation prevent kore. Jada log ek Quiet Riot e, otha valo.
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP2: Ekhon tomai automatically existing Quiet Riot e add korbo takam sohish action start korte paro.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP1: Quiet Riots shared issues sombondhe, individual targeting noi. Amra systemic problem e focus kori — poor broadband, rising energy costs, ya inadequate healthcare — nahor personal grievances specific manus er sathe.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP2: Agar tomai specific manus ya public figure er sathe frustration ache, etaa underlying issue hisebe frame kore dekho. Masalan, CEO target kore na kore company er practice sombondhe Quiet Riot suggest koro.
RejectionReasons.illegalP1: Amra Quiet Riots host korte pari na jo illegal activities promote ya organize kore. Etaa jahar violate kore applicable law, violence promote kore, ya manus ke risk e felai.
RejectionReasons.otherP1: Kabhi kabhi suggestion anek karon e fit na bhi bhite pare — shayad etaa ba vague, ya Setup Guide er aro information laagche. Ekhane tu message pabia explaining keno reject hoiche aur kita korbea.
RejectionReasons.whatNextIntro: Agar tomaar suggestion reject holei, tomai shaday korbea:
RejectionReasons.reframe: Reframe aur aro bar try koro — name ya description adjust kore guideline better fit kore
RejectionReasons.joinExisting: Existing Quiet Riot e join koro — tomaar issue shayad already cover hoiche
RejectionReasons.replyGuide: Setup Guide ke reply koro — agar tu mona koro rejection mistake chhilo, message pathiye tomaar case explain koro

AnonymousInfo.title: Anonymous First Rioters
AnonymousInfo.subtitle: Anonymous matlab ki
AnonymousInfo.intro: Konojon jokhn naya Quiet Riot start kore, taara First Quiet Rioter ban jaye. Etaa honor er badge — ja manus first kotha bolte courage diche.
AnonymousInfo.choosingIntro: Saab manus chayna nama public e attached korte. Etaa completely fine. Agar First Quiet Rioter anonymous thakte choose kore:
AnonymousInfo.choosingHidden: Tader name aur profile picture hidden thake issue page e
AnonymousInfo.choosingBadge: Anonymous badge dekha jaye instead, takam manus jane keo start korese kintu na jane ke
AnonymousInfo.choosingGuides: Setup Guides still janen ke start korese (moderation purpose e)
AnonymousInfo.choosingChange: First Rioter pore change korte pare aur public recognize hote pare
AnonymousInfo.whyIntro: Bha jad karan ache anonymous thakat:
AnonymousInfo.whyWork: Tu company e kaam kori jo issue er sathe related
AnonymousInfo.whyCause: Tu prefer kori cause nijee kotha bolte
AnonymousInfo.changingP1: Agar tomai Quiet Riot anonymous start korechish kintu pore decide korechish public recognize hote chao, tu kono time e preference update korte paro inbox through ya Setup Guide ke message kore.

FirstRioterInfo.title: First Quiet Rioter
FirstRioterInfo.subtitle: Quiet Riot shuru kora ka matlab
FirstRioterInfo.intro: Shobai Quiet Riot ek janay shuru hoy — First Quiet Rioter. Ei person hi courage er sathe keno issue raise kore movement shuru kore
FirstRioterInfo.whatIntro: Prothom person hisebey issue raise kora kharap special recognition ane:
FirstRioterInfo.whatBadge: Issue page te permanent First Quiet Rioter badge
FirstRioterInfo.whatRecognition: Publicly recognise hoba nobey anonymous thakba - tor choice
FirstRioterInfo.whatJoined: Quiet Riot te first member hisebey automatic membership
FirstRioterInfo.whatNotifications: Updates paabey jakhon suggestion review, approved nobey live hoy
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilitiesTitle: First Rioters ke ki korte hobe?
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilitiesIntro: First Rioter badge honor er badge, burden noy. Strict requirement nai, but amra encourage kori First Rioters ke:
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityChampion: Issue champion kore aro lokjoner kache share koro
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityEvidence: Evidence aar stories share koro je problem illustrate kore
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityWelcome: Noya members ke welcome koro je Quiet Riot te join kore
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionIntro: Jakhon tu noya Quiet Riot suggest koro, tui choose koro kemon recognise hote chao:
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionPublic: Public — tor name aar profile issue page te First Rioter hisebey show hobe
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionAnonymous: Anonymous — anonymous badge show hobe, tor identity protect hobe
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionChange: Anytime tor preference change kore sakto inbox ya Setup Guide ke contact kore
FirstRioterInfo.howP1: Simply noya Quiet Riot suggest koro website ya WhatsApp bot te. Jadi Setup Guides approve kore, tu oyi issue er First Quiet Rioter ban jayega
FirstRioterInfo.howP2: Tor suggestion review process dia jabe jate Setup Guides check kore guidelines follow korche kina. Tara aro info mangte pare, existing issue te merge suggest kore, nobey live hone ke approve kore

Share.title: Aapnar Quiet Riots Share
Share.profileLink: Aapnar Quiet Riots share er baare janen →
Share.heroSubtitle: Duniyar protieta Quiet Rioter ke ek share offer kora hoy Quiet Riots e — company nijei.
Share.ownershipDesc: Shareholder hoye aap Quiet Riots er real piece own koren. Eta token noy, badge noy, metaphor noy — eta genuine share ek UK limited company te, Companies House e registered.
Share.ownershipPoint1: Aap Quiet Riots er legal co-owner hoben
Share.ownershipPoint2: Aapnar share value badhe jayega jkhn company grow kore
Share.ownershipPoint3: Company jodi profit distribute kore tahole dividend paite paren
Share.ownershipPoint4: Aapnar shareholder rights ache UK company law e
Share.considerationDesc: UK company law e (Companies Act 2006), share free te issue kora jai na. Nominal payment — consideration bole — dorkar share legally valid hote.
Share.considerationAmount: Aapnar share er consideration 10 pence (ba aapnar local currency te equivalent).
Share.considerationWallet: Eta deduct hobe aapnar Quiet Riots wallet theke jkhn aap age badben.
Share.considerationRefund: Jdi application reject hoy tahole 10p automatically refund hobe aapnar wallet e.
Share.growthSharesTitle: Different Valuations e Kivabe Kaj Kore
Share.growthSharesDesc: Aapnar share growth share structure use kore — special class jo valuable hoy na jtkhn na company valuation certain point er upar jay. Ene issue er time e tax minimal thake.
Share.preSeedDesc: Shares issue hoy nominal value e. Aap 10p pay koben. Meaningful tax event nai.
Share.seedDesc: Same nominal value. Growth share hurdle set current valuation er upar.
Share.seriesADesc: Pre-emption rights waive hoyeche user share pool er jonno. Hurdle current value minimize kore.
Share.seriesBDesc: Growth share hurdle ensure kore limited current value high company valuation a bhi.
Share.seriesCDesc: User share pool defined cap table percentage. Naya dilutive issuance nai.
Share.ipoDesc: User shares convert hoy ordinary tradeable shares e. Capital gains tax apply ho sakte sale er time.
Share.responsibilitiesDesc: Share rakhte responsibility e bhi ache:
Share.responsibility1: Tax obligation depend kore aapnar country of residence er upor — qualified advisor ke consult koren
Share.responsibility2: Guarantee nai company kono valuation reach korbey
Share.responsibility3: Share structure modify ho sakte company grow hole
Share.responsibility4: Eta legal, tax ba investment advice noy
Share.disclaimer1: Eta simplified explanation — legal, tax ba investment advice noy.
Share.disclaimer2: Protieta user er tax obligation depend kore country of residence er upor.
Share.disclaimer3: Guarantee nai company kono valuation reach korbey.
Share.disclaimer4: Share structure modify ho sakte company grow hole.
Share.disclaimer5: Users nishchit kore qualified advisors ke apnar country e consult korben.
Share.eligibilityDesc: Share offer er jonno qualify korte aapne:
Share.eligibilityVerified: Verified user hote hobe (name and email ba phone confirm hote hobe)
Share.eligibilityMet: Aap eligible aapnar share er jonno!
Share.proceedDesc: Shareholder hote ready? 10p consideration deduct hobe aapnar wallet theke.
Share.proceedConfirm: Nominal payment 10p deduct hobe aapnar wallet theke. Share legally valid hote eta dorkar.
Share.proceedSuccess: Aapnar application submit hoyeche! Share Guide eta soon review korbe.
Share.declineDesc: Jdi share nai chahte paren tahole permanently decline kora jai. Kno payment nibe na.
Share.declineConfirm: Sure? Eta permanent and undo ho ja na. Aap ar share offer paben na.
Share.declineSuccess: Aap share offer decline kore feliche.
Share.withdrawDesc: Application cancel korun and 10p full refund paun.
Share.withdrawConfirm: Sure? Aapnar 10p refund hobe aapnar wallet e.
Share.withdrawSuccess: Aapnar application withdraw hoyeche. 10p refund hoyeche aapnar wallet e.
Share.reapplyTitle: Aapnar Share Er Jonno Dobara Apply Korun
Share.reapplyDesc: Aapnar previous application reject hoyeche. Dobara 10p niye apply korte paren.
Share.passwordDesc: Share section password-protected aapnar security er jonno.
Share.identityDesc: Share application complete korte aapnar identity verify kora dorkar. Eta encrypted and securely store kora hoy.
Share.identitySuccess: Aapnar identity submit hoyeche verification er jonno.
Share.identityMustBe18: Aapne minimum 18 bochor boyosh hote hobe.
Share.issueEligibilityBanner: Aap eligible aapnar share er jonno
Share.issueRequestReceived: Aapnar request receive hoyeche. Aami contact korbom.

BotMessages.shareEligible: Apni apnar Quiet Riots share er jonno joggyo! Apnar profile dekhun ba egiye jete "apply for share" bolun.
BotMessages.shareQualified: Apni apnar Quiet Riots share er jonno joggyo!
BotMessages.shareProgress: Ogrogoti: {riotsJoined}/3ti Quiet Riots jogdan korechhen, {actionsTaken}/10ti kaj somponno korechhen{verificationNote}.
BotMessages.shareNotEligible: Apni ekhono share er jonno joggyo non. Aro Quiet Riots-e jogdan korun ebong aro kaj korun.

BotMessages.shareDeclined: Apni sthaibhabe share offer prottyakhyan korechhen. Kono payment neoa hoyni. Ei siddhanto ultano jabe na.

BotMessages.shareWithdrawn: Apnar share abedon prottyahar kora hoyeche ebong apnar 10p apnar wallet-e ferot deoa hoyeche.
BotMessages.shareCannotWithdraw: Prottyahar kora jabe na — apnar abedon prottyaharjoggyo obosthay nao thaakte pare.
BotMessages.shareReapplied: Apnar wallet theke 10p kata hoyeche. Apnar share punoray abedon ekhon porjalochnadhin.
BotMessages.shareCannotReapply: Punoray abedon kora jabe na — apnar abedon prottyakhyato obosthay nao thaakte pare.
BotMessages.shareNoApplication: Apnar ekhono kono share abedon nei.
BotMessages.shareQuestionSent: Apnar proshno Share Guide team-e pathano hoyeche. Apni apnar inbox-e ekti uttor paben.
BotMessages.suggestionApproved: Shubho songbad — apnar Quiet Riot "{name}" onumodon hoyeche! Eta live hole amra apnake janabo.
BotMessages.suggestionRejectedWithLink: Apnar poramorsho "{name}" 👍 payni karon {reason}. Aro janun: https://www.quietriots.com/info/rejection-reasons
